Issue #1757 explicitly lists 'PR creation' as a valid trigger and asks for full reflect-skill invocation, which is a distinct mechanism. PR #1760 sibling workflow explicitly notes #1757 is 'complementary, not sequential'.

nextSteps: Once merged, the workflow auto-fires on next PR open and persists reflect learnings to .serena/memories/{skill}-observations.md.
Monitor first 2-3 invocations for false-positive learnings; tune confidence thresholds in .claude/skills/reflect/SKILL.md if needed.
Consider extending trigger to push-on-feature-branch as a follow-up if PR-only proves too coarse.
